project.name: 11 — Team Task Dashboard (4 Views · 6 Pipes · 3 DB Collections)

M12.name: dash_subtitle
M12.text: 4 views: dashboard / tasks / team / settings. 6 pipes (3× GET, 2× POST, 1× PUT). 2 loops. 3 DB collections. 44 wires. 14 events. Tasks + team auto-load via loopRender on view activation.

wires.actionArgs: ✦  Stats loaded from GET /api/stats — totalTasks: 6  openTasks: 4  teamSize: 4

M29.name: stats_raw_label
M29.text: Raw API Response — loadStats GET /api/stats (pipeBinding → textContent)

M37.name: new_task_heading
M37.text: New Task — POST /api/tasks via createTask pipe  ·  also fires updateStats PUT /api/stats

wires.actionArgs: ✦  Task written via POST /api/tasks — updateStats PUT /api/stats fired — loadTasks re-fetched — taskList loop re-rendered

M45.name: tasks_list_label
M45.text: taskList loop — template: {{title}}, {{assignee}}, {{priority}}, {{due}}, {{status}}, {{created}}, {{_index}}, {{_total}} — auto-renders on view:tasks

M47.name: tasks_raw_label
M47.text: Raw API Response — loadTasks GET /api/tasks (pipeBinding → textContent)

M55.name: add_member_heading
M55.text: Add Member — POST /api/team via addMember pipe

wires.actionArgs: ✦  Member added via POST /api/team — loadTeam re-fetched — teamCards loop re-rendered

M62.name: team_list_label
M62.text: teamCards loop — template: {{name}}, {{role}}, {{email}}, {{joined}}, {{_index}}, {{_total}} — auto-renders on view:team

M64.name: team_raw_label
M64.text: Raw API Response — loadTeam GET /api/team (pipeBinding → textContent)

M69.name: settings_subtitle
M69.text: Preference toggles wired to themeDark / themeLight / notifOn / notifOff events via addClass, removeClass, show, hide wires. Save fires settingsSaved. loadStats pipeBinding shown again here to demonstrate one pipe bound to two separate elements.

wires.actionArgs: ✦  settingsSaved event fired — theme + notification state held in session

M83.name: settings_debug_label
M83.text: Live DB Snapshot — loadStats GET /api/stats re-bound here: one pipe, two pipeBinding elements (M30 on dashboard + M84 here)

loadStats.name: loadStats
loadStats.description: Fetch the stats single-doc from DB

updateStats.name: updateStats
updateStats.description: Update the stats single-doc after task creation

createTask.name: createTask
createTask.description: Write a new task to the tasks collection

loadTeam.name: loadTeam
loadTeam.description: Fetch all team members from DB

addMember.name: addMember
addMember.description: Write a new team member to the team collection

dashboard.name: dashboard
dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Stats overview — load stats, navigate to other views

tasks.name: tasks
tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.description: Task board — taskList loop auto-renders on view:tasks, form POSTs new task

team.name: team
team.title: Team
team.description: Team roster — teamCards loop auto-renders on view:team, form POSTs new member

settings.name: settings
settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Preference toggles — theme/notif events, save fires settingsSaved

statTotal.name: statTotal
statTotal.description: Renders {{totalTasks}} from stats single-doc into the Total Tasks counter

statOpen.name: statOpen
statOpen.description: Renders {{openTasks}} from stats single-doc into the Open Tasks counter

statTeam.name: statTeam
statTeam.description: Renders {{teamSize}} from stats single-doc into the Team Members counter

taskList.name: taskList
taskList.description: Render each task as a card — auto-triggered by loopRender wire on view:tasks event
taskList.template:
{{status}}
{{title}}
→ {{assignee}}
{{priority}} · Due {{due}} · Created {{created}} · entry {{_index}} of {{_total}}

teamCards.name: teamCards
teamCards.description: Render each team member — auto-triggered by loopRender wire on view:team event
